{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041556ABA2B14AAC2DCD320DA5"}"},"total":487},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523584140737315608","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"经典的先天生灵化形拜师，但与其他被人算计还要苟一段时间的书不一样，这本书从开局到完结，主角应该都是处于顶尖水平，没人敢随意欺负，这本书偏休闲整活，没有多少具体的打斗，很不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751725353,"group_id":"7388925480956611609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2io4gG5Cx9q9YV5m9IP4kg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/92c52633a7a6400bba78cab8bf5a6829~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706501&x-signature=uoTHZp%2Brc7tcxpNLEtWRTzHdQME%3D","user_id":"3267005374","user_name":"王和平爱李涛英"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3267005374","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7388925480956611609","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书已发，欢迎捧场！爱你们！）
站在你面前的是，人教大师兄，玄门先锋，天庭第一土地公兼任北极紫薇大帝，司法天神指挥使，灵台方寸职业技术学院院长-时雨
穿越洪荒，化作先天生灵太虚水云鹤，身负太极虚影，大道亲水。
出世之时，天降异象，正巧被来东方化缘（避难）的西方二圣发现，见此子机缘逆天，定与他西方有缘，遂打算强行度去西方之时，被太清圣人所拦下，收为弟子。
从此玄门多了一位忠肝义胆大师兄........
“只要我时雨在一天，三清必不可能闹掰！”
时雨手持伴生灵宝云虚水扇，冲在玄门第一线，好一个玄门先锋，人教大将啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/85bd20dcac58d75fdd328f73b20ba6fc","author":"情人节没有花","author_id":"","book_id":"7388925480956611609","book_name":"洪荒：玄门大师兄，洪荒及时雨！","book_short_name":"云鹤问道","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7451239571175834174","read_count":"25595","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1578434"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"705","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒,架空,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/432ce1ffec29185b6aae01730e21b97c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308156&x-signature=nZJsgXtfOViqRdBcFuY9Es7eDAU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3298131958310548","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"373"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041556ABA2B14AAC2DCD320DA5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"f
